title: lathyrus luteus subsp. laevigatus
intro: Lathyrus luteus subsp. laevigatus, also known as the smooth yellow pea, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus luteus subsp. laevigatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a food source, particularly in traditional cuisines.
